nl_query: Which courses have no faculty_course_mapping entries for 2025-2026?
failed_sql:
SELECT au.id, au.code, au.name
FROM   academic_unit au
WHERE  au.unit_type = 'COURSE'
  AND  au.is_active = TRUE
  AND  NOT EXISTS (
         SELECT 1 FROM faculty_course_mapping fcm
         JOIN   exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.exam_id = fcm.exam_id
         WHERE  fcm.course_id     = au.id
           AND  esc.academic_year = '2025-2026'
       )
ORDER  BY au.code;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): faculty_course_mapping.exam_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
